name: source-shaped active rail v1
architecture: single long minimum-jerk support decompression q(s)
baseline-subtracted source accounting distinguishing standing plant support from active-service excess

frozen_rules.packet_order: catch/rematch before shift fade; shift fades inside support hold/shoulder
frozen_rules.support_decompression: q(s) is not a sharp post-service falloff; it is a long adiabatic decompression shoulder
frozen_rules.angular_jacket: mild broad angular compliance layer around the throat support

interpretation.source_ledger: mostly geometry/support-edge dominated in the caught branch
interpretation.soft_jacket: improves null and packet-support exposure but does not eliminate standing angular pressure
interpretation.adiabatic_q: removes the dynamic throat-relaxation angular-pressure spike
interpretation.remaining_ledger: large angular-pressure ceiling assigned primarily to standing plant-support ledger
